scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --test packages/core/test/*.test.ts packages/web-benchmark/test/*.test.ts packages/web-workflow/test/*.test.ts packages/web-reporting/test/*.test.ts packages/websocket-benchmark/test/*.test.ts packages/cli-benchmark/test/*.test.ts packages/network-phase-benchmark/test/*.test.ts packages/evidence-report/test/*.test.ts apps/web/test/*.test.ts apps/agent/test/*.test.ts
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run build:web && npm run build:agent && npm run smoke:agent
